title: dbt Cloud Terraform YAML Configuration Schema v1
description: JSON Schema for validating dbt Cloud YAML configuration files (v1). Supports both singular project: and list-based projects: shapes. Use with VS Code YAML extension or JetBrains built-in YAML validation.

partial_parsing.description: Enable partial parsing for faster runs

global_connections.description: Account-level global connections referenced by environments via connection_key

key.description: Unique key used to reference this connection in environments

http_path.description: [Databricks] HTTP path for the warehouse or cluster

database.description: [Snowflake] Default database; [Salesforce] optional target database (provider default)

data_transform_run_timeout.description: [Salesforce] Timeout in seconds for data transformation runs

privatelink_endpoints.description: Optional registry of PrivateLink endpoints (key + endpoint_id) for resolving global_connections[].private_link_endpoint_key and project.repository.private_link_endpoint_key; same pattern as v2 globals.privatelink_endpoints

endpoint_id.description: PrivateLink endpoint identifier to match against dbt Cloud (data.dbtcloud_privatelink_endpoints)

key.description: Unique key for this service token

id.description: Optional stable external id; maps to resource_metadata.source_id when the dbtcloud Terraform provider supports it

protected.description: When true, the token uses lifecycle.prevent_destroy

permissions.description: Permission sets granted to this token (v1 schema key)

project_key.description: Restrict to a specific project key (resolved to project_id at apply via module wiring)

project_id.description: Numeric dbt Cloud project ID when not using project_key

writable_environment_categories.description: Environment types for write permission scoping (analyst, database_admin, developer, git_admin, team_admin); omit means all (provider default)

service_token_permissions.description: Same shape as permissions[] (v2 / importer naming; preferred when non-empty — see COMPAT in modules/service_tokens)

project_key.description: Restrict to a specific project key (resolved to project_id at apply via module wiring)

project_id.description: Numeric dbt Cloud project ID when not using project_key

writable_environment_categories.description: Environment types for write permission scoping (analyst, database_admin, developer, git_admin, team_admin); omit means all (provider default)

id.description: Optional stable external id; maps to resource_metadata.source_id when the dbtcloud Terraform provider supports it

protected.description: When true, the group uses lifecycle.prevent_destroy

assign_by_default.description: Automatically assign new users to this group

sso_mapping_groups.description: SSO group names to map to this group

permissions.description: RBAC partial permissions for this group (legacy key; same shape as group_permissions)

project_id.description: Numeric dbt Cloud project ID when not all_projects

writable_environment_categories.description: Environment types for write access (analyst, developer, git_admin, team_admin, database_admin only)

group_permissions.description: RBAC partial permissions (v2 / importer naming; preferred when both are present)

project_id.description: Numeric dbt Cloud project ID when not all_projects

key.description: Optional unique Terraform for_each key; defaults to string user_id

id.description: Optional stable external id; maps to resource_metadata.source_id when the dbtcloud Terraform provider supports it

group_keys.description: List of group keys to assign the user to

id.description: Optional stable external id; maps to resource_metadata.source_id when the dbtcloud Terraform provider supports it

protected.description: When true, sets lifecycle.prevent_destroy on this notification

notification_type.description: Per dbt-labs/dbtcloud provider: 1=dbt Cloud user email, 2=Slack (requires slack_channel_id/name and a valid user_id for the Slack integration owner), 4=external email (requires external_email; user_id still required by API). Values 3/5 may appear in legacy docs; prefer 4 for external email. Webhook support depends on provider version.

user_id.description: dbt Cloud user ID (required by API for all notification types, including Slack and external email)

webhook_id.description: [Reserved] Not applied by stock dbtcloud provider dbtcloud_notification; kept for schema forward-compatibility

on_failure.description: Job IDs to notify on failure

on_success.description: Job IDs to notify on success

on_cancel.description: Job IDs to notify on cancel

on_warning.description: Job IDs to notify on warning

oauth_configurations.description: Account-level OAuth configurations. Client secrets are supplied via var.oauth_client_secrets[key].

key.description: Unique key (also used as lookup key in oauth_client_secrets)

id.description: Optional stable external id; maps to resource_metadata.source_id when the dbtcloud Terraform provider supports it

protected.description: When true, use prevent_destroy lifecycle on this OAuth configuration

redirect_uri.description: OAuth redirect URI registered with the provider

application_id_uri.description: [Entra ID] Application ID URI for the OAuth integration

id.description: Optional stable external id; maps to resource_metadata.source_id when the dbtcloud Terraform provider supports it

protected.description: When true, sets lifecycle.prevent_destroy on the rule

rule_set_enabled.description: Whether the IP restriction rule set is active

projects.description: List of dbt Cloud projects. Use this (plural) for multi-project configs. See also: project (singular).

project.description: Single dbt Cloud project. Legacy singular form — prefer projects: (list).

key.description: Unique key for cross-referencing this project

protected.description: Protect from accidental deletion via lifecycle ignore

repository_protected.description: When set, controls repository + project_repository prevent_destroy independently of protected (v2 parity; falls back to protected when null)

remote_url.description: Repository path or URL. For GitHub/GitLab/Azure DevOps native integrations this is typically 'org/repo'. For deploy-key connections use HTTPS or SSH URL.

git_clone_strategy.description: Clone strategy. Auto-detected from integration IDs if omitted. Options: deploy_key, github_app, deploy_token, azure_active_directory_app

gitlab_project_id.description: [GitLab native] GitLab project ID (numeric, found in project Settings > General)

pull_request_url_template.description: Custom URL template for opening pull requests. Use {{source}} and {{destination}} placeholders.

azure_active_directory_project_id.description: [Azure DevOps native] Azure DevOps project ID (UUID)

azure_active_directory_repository_id.description: [Azure DevOps native] Azure DevOps repository ID (UUID)

azure_bypass_webhook_registration_failur.description: [Azure DevOps native] If true, connection succeeds even if webhook registration fails

private_link_endpoint_id.description: Private Link endpoint ID for VPC access

private_link_endpoint_key.description: References privatelink_endpoints[].key to resolve endpoint via data.dbtcloud_privatelink_endpoints when private_link_endpoint_id is omitted (v1 schema; v2 may rename — see COMPAT in modules/repository)

is_active.description: Whether the repository connection is active

extended_attributes.description: Extended attribute sets that can be applied to environments

name.description: Display name (v1); optional when using v2 extended_attributes

key.description: Unique key for referencing in environments/profiles via extended_attributes_key

content.description: v1: adapter-specific overrides (e.g. databricks.http_path). Use extended_attributes for v2/importer shape (COMPAT in modules/extended_attributes).

extended_attributes.description: v2/importer: adapter overrides object (same JSON as API extended_attributes). Prefer over content when importing from dbt Cloud.

id.description: Legacy dbt Cloud extended attributes id (import/migration); remapped via extended_attribute_ids_by_source_id for profiles/environments (COMPAT v2/importer).

protected.description: When true, Terraform lifecycle prevents destroy on this extended_attributes resource

state.description: dbt Cloud state (1 = active, 2 = inactive); defaults to 1 in Terraform when null

environments.description: dbt Cloud environments for this project

key.description: Unique key within this project for cross-referencing

connection_key.description: References global_connections[].key to attach a global connection, or LOOKUP:Connection Name for an existing account connection (see module data_lookups). If connection is also set, connection wins.

connection.description: Optional v2-style field; when set, takes precedence over connection_key. Same semantics (key, numeric id, or LOOKUP:Name).

deployment_type.description: Deployment environment classification (required for type: deployment)

custom_branch.description: Custom git branch. Null uses the project default branch.

dbt_version.description: dbt version override for this environment (e.g. '1.8.0')

extended_attributes_key.description: References extended_attributes[].key to apply adapter overrides

extended_attributes_id.description: Legacy dbt Cloud extended_attributes_id or pass-through when not managed here; coalesced with extended_attribute_ids_by_source_id when extended_attributes[].id is set (COMPAT v2/importer).

token_name.description: [Databricks] Key in token_map variable containing the personal access token

id.description: Legacy dbt Cloud warehouse credential ID (import/migration). After apply, profiles may resolve via credential_ids_by_source_id; see COMPAT in modules/credentials.

jobs.description: Jobs for this project, referencing environments by environment_key

environment_key.description: References environments[].key to place this job

execute_steps.description: dbt commands to execute (e.g. 'dbt build', 'dbt test')

github_webhook.description: Trigger on GitHub webhook (requires GitHub App integration)

git_provider_webhook.description: Trigger on git provider webhook (GitLab, Azure DevOps, etc.)

on_merge.description: Trigger when a PR is merged

schedule_days.description: Days of week to run (0=Sunday … 6=Saturday). Used with days_of_week schedule_type.

schedule_hours.description: Hours of day to run (0–23, UTC). Used with days_of_week and every_day schedule types.

schedule_cron.description: Custom cron expression (5-field, UTC). Used with custom_cron schedule_type.

deferring_environment_key.description: References environments[].key to defer to that environment's most recent successful run

deferring_job_key.description: References another job[].key to defer to a specific job

self_deferring.description: Defer to this job's own latest successful run

errors_on_lint_failure.description: Fail job if linting errors are found

triggers_on_draft_pr.description: Allow webhook triggers on draft PRs

name.description: Variable name. Must start with DBT_.

environment_values.description: Per-environment values. Use env: 'project' for the project-level default.

env.description: Environment name or 'project' for the project-level default

value.description: Variable value. Prefix with 'secret_' to reference a token_map key.

connection_key.description: References global_connections[].key or LOOKUP:Connection Name for an existing account global connection (module data_lookups)

credential_key.description: Composite key (project_key_env_key) or project_key_profile_key referencing the credential to use

credentials_id.description: Legacy dbt Cloud credentials_id or placeholder for migration; coalesced with credential_ids_by_source_id when set (COMPAT v2/importer).

credential.description: COMPAT(v1-schema): inline profile credential metadata when minting a Terraform-managed credential (secrets via environment_credentials[project_key_profile_key]); see modules/credentials.

extended_attributes_id.description: Legacy dbt Cloud extended_attributes_id; coalesced with extended_attribute_ids_by_source_id when YAML extended_attributes[].id is set (COMPAT v2/importer; see modules/profiles).

key.description: Unique key. Auth token supplied via var.lineage_tokens[project_key_integration_key].

artefacts.description: Project artefact job assignments for docs and source freshness

docs_job.description: References jobs[].key for the job that generates dbt docs

freshness_job.description: References jobs[].key for the job that runs source freshness

environment_key.description: References environments[].key for the Semantic Layer environment
